files.content:
# iam.tf - Manages Service Accounts and Permissions

# --- Service Agent Identities ---

# Get the service agent identity for Cloud Storage. This resource waits for the
# service agent to be created by GCP after the storage API is enabled, which
# resolves race conditions.
resource "google_project_service_identity" "gcs_service_agent" {
  provider = google-beta
  project  = var.project_id
  service  = "storage.googleapis.com"

  depends_on = [
    google_project_service.storage
  ]
}

# Get the service agent identity for Eventarc. This is required to grant the
# agent permission to invoke our Cloud Functions.
resource "google_project_service_identity" "eventarc_service_agent" {
  provider = google-beta
  project  = var.project_id
  service  = "eventarc.googleapis.com"

  depends_on = [
    google_project_service.eventarc
  ]
}

# --- Application Service Account ---

# Create a dedicated service account for our application's Cloud Functions.
resource "google_service_account" "functions_service_account" {
  project      = var.project_id
  account_id   = "sch-functions-sa"
  display_name = "Seychelles Compliance Hub Functions Service Account"
}

# Define a map of roles for the functions' service account for clarity and maintainability.
locals {
  function_roles = {
    # Required to write to Firestore
    "datastore_user" = "roles/datastore.user",
    # Required to receive events from Eventarc triggers
    "event_receiver" = "roles/eventarc.eventReceiver",
    # Required to write logs
    "logging_writer" = "roles/logging.logWriter",
    # Required to read/write to the GCS bucket
    "storage_admin" = "roles/storage.objectAdmin",
    # Required for the service account to be used as a build identity.
    "builds_builder" = "roles/cloudbuild.builds.builder"
  }
}

# Grant the application service account the necessary roles to perform its tasks.
resource "google_project_iam_member" "functions_iam_bindings" {
  project = var.project_id
  for_each = local.function_roles

  role   = each.value
  member = "serviceAccount:${google_service_account.functions_service_account.email}"
}

# --- Service Agent Permissions ---

resource "google_project_iam_member" "storage_event_publisher" {
  project = var.project_id
  role    = "roles/pubsub.publisher"
  member  = google_project_service_identity.gcs_service_agent.member

  depends_on = [
    # Explicitly wait for the service agent to be resolved before creating this binding.
    google_project_service_identity.gcs_service_agent
  ]
}

resource "google_project_iam_member" "eventarc_cloud_run_invoker" {
  project = var.project_id
  role    = "roles/run.invoker"
  member  = google_project_service_identity.eventarc_service_agent.member

  depends_on = [
    google_project_service_identity.eventarc_service_agent
  ]
}
